about.title: About Me
about.p1: Self-taught Mid-Level Full-stack Engineer with hands-on experience designing and delivering production-grade SaaS applications from the ground up, skilled in backend, frontend, cloud infrastructure, AI-powered systems, authentication, observability, asynchronous processing, and CI/CD. Comfortable across the entire stack — building async Python/FastAPI backends with Clean Architecture, React/Next.js frontends, PostgreSQL data models, Redis caching layers, and cloud deployments on AWS/Vercel/Railway. Recently focused on integrating LLM-powered agents (LangChain, CrewAI) into real products, including a fraud-detection pipeline and a multi-tenant intelligent automation platform. Currently seeking an international remote role where I can make a meaningful contribution to a fast-moving team and keep growing.

psi: Multi-stage AI pipeline: OCR → extraction → 7-phase LLM analysis → 5-tier risk score (0–100)
FastAPI + Clean Architecture backend with SQLAlchemy ORM and Alembic
Multi-agent collaboration via CrewAI — Gemini + DeepSeek orchestration
Full CI/CD: GitHub Actions → Railway (API) + Vercel (frontend)
pytomatiza: CrewAI/LangChain agent pipelines for multi-domain workflow automation
Next.js frontend + FastAPI backend with Docker containerisation
Production deployments on Railway + Vercel with env-aware CI/CD
Configurable agent tools enabling non-technical users to compose automations
clark: Virtualized large track lists with react-window for 60fps performance
Redis session management + Resend email auth integration
MusicBrainz, iTunes & Spotify API metadata enrichment
facilit: CrewAI agents + Z-API for intelligent WhatsApp conversation handling
Flask backend with React Native (Expo) mobile frontend
Built for a real home-appliance business client
eude_ramos: Responsive single-page portfolio with modern UI/UX design
Built with Next.js and TypeScript for optimal performance
SEO-optimized with server-side rendering and metadata
Deployed on Vercel with CI/CD via GitHub integration
